subcodes.first_line: O noble Branch of the blessed Tree! A multitude of occupations and cares hath prevented me from writing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الکریم من الدوحه المبارکه کثرت مشاغل و غوائل مانع از تحریر است
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @consolation and comfort
